title: The initial contract is set for a 6-month basis to allow both
content:
The initial contract is set for a 6-month basis to allow both parties to assess the effectiveness of the partnership and ensure that the services meet the client's needs. This duration can be extended or made into a longer-term agreement based on mutual satisfaction and achieving initial marketing goals. Regular review meetings will be scheduled to discuss performance, contract continuation, and potential scope or strategy adjustments.

12. Signatures
